title: feat: checkout service fee + exclusive-tax pricing
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds exclusive-tax checkout pricing with a per-pack service fee (3.5% + $0.30) to checkout and auto top-up.
- No environment gate and no grace period: the new pricing applies to everyone from the production deploy (buyers pay VAT + fee on top of the pack price).
- Verifies auto top-up invoices line-by-line (pack + service fee); pre-deploy pack-only invoices fail verification by design (attempt marked failed with reason, credit manually if one lands in the deploy window).
- Shows the service fee on the pack slider and auto top-up panel; tax calculated at checkout.
- Adds STAGING_ALLOWED_EMAILS so staging access can be granted by email.

Tests:
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npx vitest run test/pollen-packs.test.ts test/staging-access.test.ts test/integration/stripe.test.ts`

gist.headline: Updated Pollen checkout
gist.blurb: We've updated the checkout flow to clearly separate service fees and taxes from your Pollen pack purchases.
gist.summary: Updated the checkout and auto top-up flows to apply a 3.5% + $0.30 service fee and exclusive tax on top of Pollen pack prices.
gist.impact: Users will now see service fees and calculated taxes itemized separately during checkout and on the auto top-up panel.
gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) and the Nomnom creature interacting with a glowing digital receipt or retro cash register, representing checkout and itemized billing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the round tan Nomnom creature looking at a long, glowing digital receipt printing from a retro terminal. The Nomnom creature is happily eating the end of the receipt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
